name: Glacial Ice Cavern
description: The fissure opens into a cathedral of ice, its walls smooth and glassy, glowing with a faint inner blue. Icicles hang like spears from the unseen ceiling, and the floor is a treacherous mirror of frozen meltwater. The silence here is total, broken only by the slow drip of ancient ice.
ambient_messages: An icicle shears loose overhead and shatters on the frozen floor with a crystalline crash.
The blue glow of the ice walls pulses faintly, as if the cavern itself were breathing.
A drip of meltwater echoes through the cavern, impossibly loud in the silence.
